description.p: Open Snipping is a lightweight screenshot application for Linux, designed to provide a seamless experience similar to the Windows Snipping Tool. It supports both X11 and Wayland environments.

ul.li: Silent Fullscreen Capture: Instantly captures the entire screen when triggered.
Smart Overlay Window: Features a frameless, transparent overlay to focus on the selected area.
Select & Crop: Click and drag to define the exact region you want to capture.
Quick Export & Copy: Instantly copy the snip to your clipboard or save it as an image file.
